[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000001001 2
1 0000010010 2
2 1000001100 3
3 0010010000 2
4 1011001000 4
5 0010000000 1
6 0101101001 5
7 0000000010 1

01 10 0000000000 a
12 21 0000001100 2
23 32 0010011110 5
34 43 1010010000 3
45 54 1010000000 2
56 65 0110001001 4
67 76 0100001011 4
70 07 0000010010 2 match 1

02 20 0000010010 2 match 1

24 42 0010010000 2 match 3
35 53 1011001000 4 match 4
46 64 0010000000 1 match 5
57 75 0101101001 5 match 6
60 06 0000000010 1 match 7
71 17 0000001001 2 match 0
